# Cesar Moreno — Full Stack Engineer · AI

> I build AI systems that think, act, and scale — from multi-agent orchestration to production platforms across LATAM.

## About

Full Stack Engineer specializing in AI with 13+ years of production experience. Currently at Apprecio, building automation solutions with AI agents across a multi-tenant rewards platform serving 500K+ users in 6 LATAM countries.

## Key Achievements

- 97.5% token cost reduction in AI agent systems through intelligent caching
- 40% faster product delivery through AI-powered workflow automation
- 25% microservice performance improvement across 13+ services
- Multi-tenant platform with full data isolation across 6 countries

## Core Expertise

- AI Agents: Multi-model LLM orchestration (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini), Think→Act→Observe loops
- Backend: TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Express, GraphQL, microservices
- Frontend: React, Astro, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Databases: PostgreSQL (RLS), Supabase, MongoDB, Redis
- Cloud: AWS, Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions
- Testing: Playwright, Vitest

## Featured Projects

- Agentes Hub: Multi-agent system for automated PR code reviews with 97.5% token savings
  https://github.com/cmorenogit/agentes-hub
- Prompt Hub: Centralized prompt management with versioning, reduced drift by 80%
  https://github.com/cmorenogit/prompt-hub
- Prism: CLI tool orchestrating structured debates between Claude, GPT, and Gemini
  https://github.com/cmorenogit/prism
- Claude Statusline: Rich statusline for Claude Code CLI, published on npm
  https://github.com/cmorenogit/claude-statusline
